license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8e3htgn
title: Glycerol stocks
author: Igem Dusseldorf

steps_raw.instruction: Overnight liquid culture (3mL) + Antibiotic. For E.coli (Low salt) LB For Pichia YPD
80% Glycerol: mix 20mL H2O with 80mL pure glycerol and then autoclave
E. coli: 812µL of cells mix with 188 µL of sterile 80% glycerol
Pichia: Spin 2min at 2000g. Decant 2ml. Resuspend in remaining liquid. 812µL of cells mix with 188µL of sterile 80% glycerol
Use cryovials for freezing away. Store at -80° C
